Section.name: UNCLASSIFIED
Section.Content: SD - My Workplace Assistant Service description – My Workplace Assistant Prepared for: [Company] Prepared by: Vincent Vandersmissen Date: 21/05/2025 Cegeka reference: [Reference] CONFIDENTIAL Table of Contents 1 Standard Service Description 3 1.1 Introduction 3 1.2 Added Business Value 3 1.2.1 Strategic boost to productivity and efficiency 3 1.2.2 Transformative collaboration and communication 3 1.2.3 Increased user engagement 4 1.3 What is included in the service? 5 1.3.1 Standard services 5 1.3.2 Optional Services 5 1.3.3 Responsibility matrix 6 1.4 SKU overview 7 1.4.1 Service SKUs 7 1.4.2 Standard changes SKUs 8 1.4.3 Non-standard changes SKUs 25 1.5 Service Level Agreement 28 1.5.1 Service Window 28 1.5.2 Specific Service Levels 28 1.6 Conditions 28 1.7 Out of scope 28 1.8 Cross-functional services 28

Section.name: Introduction
Section.Content: In today's rapidly evolving digital landscape, the adoption of innovative tools like Microsoft 365 Copilot is crucial for enhancing productivity, collaboration, and overall organizational efficiency. Cegeka, a leader in digital transformation, has developed a comprehensive Copilot User Adoption strategy to ensure that employees are well-equipped to leverage these advanced capabilities. This strategy not only addresses the technical implementation but also focuses on the human aspect, recognizing that user adoption is a key determinant of success. The user adoption service is tailored to overcome common barriers such as resistance to change, lack of skills, and low awareness. By fostering a digitally competent and resilient workforce, Cegeka aims to create an engaging and intuitive digital workplace that encourages self-direction and collaboration. Our approach is grounded in the Prosci ADKAR model, emphasizing awareness, desire, knowledge, ability and reinforcement. This structured framework ensures that end-users are informed, motivated, and empowered to embrace Microsoft 365 Copilot effectively. We incorporate a variety of learning tools, including training sessions, webinars, e-learning modules, and interactive support, to cater to different user needs and preferences. In order to guarantee a smooth and successful transition to the modern digital workplace enabled by Microsoft 365 Copilot, Cegeka creates a journey that is maximally aligned with the unique needs and goals of each organization, through meticulous planning, stakeholder engagement, and continuous support. Through meticulous planning, stakeholder engagement, and continuous support, we ensure a smooth and successful transition to the modern digital workplace enabled by Microsoft 365 Copilot.

Section.name: Added Business Value
Section.Content: Our Microsoft 365 Copilot service offers substantial added business value by addressing key challenges and enhancing various aspects of the digital workplace. Here are three compelling benefits that underscore the value proposition of Copilot:

Section.name: Strategic boost to productivity and efficiency
Section.Header: Strategic boost to productivity and efficiency
Section.Content: Microsoft 365 Copilot is a game-changer in driving productivity, providing intelligent assistance and automating tasks with Agents. Executives will appreciate how Copilot enables users to draft emails, create documents, and manage workflows with remarkable efficiency. By cutting down the time spent on routine tasks, employees can dedicate more effort to strategic, high-value activities, leading to a substantial increase in overall productivity and streamlined operations.

Section.name: Transformative collaboration and communication
Section.Content: Copilot significantly enhances collaboration and communication within teams by seamlessly integrating with key Microsoft 365 applications such as Teams, Word, and Outlook. Real-time assistance, contextual suggestions, and actionable insights foster more effective teamwork and smoother communication. For C-level executives, this means improved project outcomes, faster decision-making, and a cohesive work environment that drives business success.

Section.name: Increased user engagement
Section.Content: Copilot offers a personalized and user-centric experience, which is pivotal for driving higher engagement and adoption rates of digital tools. Its intuitive interface and smart functionalities empower users to feel more confident and proficient with the technology. This increased adoption rate translates to maximized ROI on Microsoft 365 investments and a highly competent workforce that is adaptable and ready to meet future challenges. Implementing Copilot into the digital workplace doesn't just address current inefficiencies; it lays a robust foundation for a future-oriented, highly efficient, and collaborative organizational culture. This strategic advantage is precisely what C-level executives need to stay ahead in a competitive market.

Section.name: What is included in the service?
Section.Header: What is included in the service?
Section.Content: We offer two types of services for the adoption approach: a standard service and an additional optional service with standard and non-standard changes . The basic package includes the essential services to ensure a smooth and successful adoption of Copilot in the organization. These services cover the change management aspects, such as ambassador engagement, communication, community calls with employees. The basic package provides the end-users with the necessary skills and knowledge to use Copilot effectively and efficiently. The optional package contains additional services that can enhance the adoption and value of Copilot in your organization. These services include advanced trainings. The optional package allows you to tailor the adoption service to your specific needs and goals. The following chapters explain the details of each service, including the scope, deliverables and pricing.

Section.name: Standard services
Section.Content: Objective : To establish a structured and ongoing engagement process with the Adoption Core Team responsible for overseeing the implementation and success of Microsoft 365 Copilot . This will ensure that the team is aligned, informed, and responsive to the evolving needs of the program. Duration: 2 hour meeting Participants : stakeholders and sponsor (max 8 people per meeting) Key Activities: Expected Outcomes: Continuous improvement in the adoption strategy based on team insights and user feedback.

Section.name: Responsibility matrix
Section.Content: This Responsibility Matrix provides the appropriate RACI tags for the Customer and Cegeka with respect to the activities for the Standard and Optional Services. Activity matrix & deliverables CUSTOMER CEGEKA Standard services Responsible: The person/organization that carries out the task. He or she is accountable to the person ultimately responsible (Accountable); Accountable: This person/organization is ultimately responsible for completing one or more project tasks. Therefore, accountability is given to the person ultimately responsible, and he or she approves or disapproves a task; Consulted: This person/organization is asked for advice in advance. He or she must provide approval or input for a certain task in the project; Informed: This person/organization is informed about the decisions in the progress of the process or project. Of course, this person cannot influence the result of the task.

Section.name: SKU overview
Section.Content: Measurement The price of the My Workplace Assistant service is based upon a Unit price (P) for following SKU’s and the quantity of the ordered SKU’s

Section.name: Service SKUs
Section.Content: Monthly SKU Unit OF MEASUREMEnt Follow-up with the adoption core team * Per Customer * mandatory SKU Each SKU represents a Standard or Optional service entry in the PxQ pricing overview table, where each service entry has: The total monthly Price for the Service is the sum of all PXQ.

Section.name: Standard changes SKUs
Section.Content: Table below represents the Standard Changes for this Service, where each Standard Change Standard Change SLT (elapsed working days) Business Change Management 15 15 15 User Adoption 15 15 15 15 15 15 We require 3-4 calendar weeks for the standard changes like training and workshops due to necessary planning, customization of content, and participant readiness. This timeframe allows us to schedule trainers, customize materials, and ensure participants have sufficient time to plan and prepare for the sessions or workshops, resulting in a more effective and tailored experience. Price Calculation [Sum of all( Standard Change )*(Quantity of Standard Changes )] Objective : To conduct a comprehensive evaluation of the current state of adoption within Microsoft 365/Copilot environments across the customer. This assessment aims to identify existing challenges and opportunities, evaluate the change maturity of the organization, and establish clear goals for enhancing user adoption. Besides collecting crucial information for the project team, this phase is already a first awareness and engagement for relevant stakeholders and key players. If the customer has already executed parts of this needs assessment in a previous journey, we will re-use as much as possible the information and define together with the customer which key activitiest are still relevant to (re-)execute in this phase of the project, so it also meets the secondary goal of creating the necessary awareness and engagement /involvement with the stakeholders. Duration : 3 workshops of 2 hours Participants : stakeholders and sponsor (max 6 people per workshop) Key Activities: Expected Outcomes: Objective : To define/refine Key Performance Indicators (KPIs), establish success criteria, and outline the benefits of adopting Microsoft 365/Copilot. This will enable the organization to measure progress, evaluate the impact of adoption strategies, and communicate the value to stakeholders. Duration: 2 workshops of 2 hours Participants : stakeholders and sponsor (max 6 people per workshop) Key Performance Indicators (KPIs): Success Criteria: Recognition of Microsoft 365/Copilot for M365 value in internal communications. Objective : To establish a systematic approach for tracking and analyzing the Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) related to the adoption. This includes the implementation of surveys to capture user feedback and satisfaction levels, which will inform continuous improvement efforts. Participants : N/A (internal follow-up by the adoption team) Requirement : criteria are already defined by the customer. If not, we can initiate a standard change to define the criteria. Key Activities: Expected Outcomes: Enhanced decision-making capabilities for stakeholders based on data-driven evidence. In the rapidly evolving landscape of digital transformation, the adoption of innovative tools like Microsoft 365 Copilot is essential for organizations seeking to enhance productivity and collaboration. Ambassadors play a pivotal role in this process, serving as the linchpin between technology and its users. They are not just early adopters; they are the champions of change, the voices that resonate with credibility and enthusiasm across departments. Ambassadors help demystify new technologies, making them accessible and relatable to all members of an organization. Their firsthand experience and expertise enable them to provide valuable insights, tailored guidance, and practical demonstrations that showcase the benefits of Microsoft and Microsoft 365 Copilot in real-world scenarios. By embodying the spirit of innovation, ambassadors foster an environment where learning and adaptation flourish, paving the way for a seamless integration of these tools into the daily workflow. Moreover, ambassadors act as a feedback loop, conveying the needs and concerns of users back to decision-makers and developers. This ensures that the tools evolve in alignment with the users’ requirements, leading to continuous improvement and a more user-centric experience. In essence, ambassadors are the catalysts for a culture of continuous learning and improvement, essential for the successful adoption of Microsoft 365 Copilot . Objective : To create a robust Ambassador Framework that empowers key individuals within the organization to champion the use of Microsoft 365 Copilot . This framework will facilitate peer-to-peer learning, increase engagement, and drive the adoption of Copilot through influential advocates. Duration: 3 workshops of 2 hours Participants : stakeholders and sponsor (max 8 people per meeting) Key Activities: Expected Outcomes: Objective : To enhance the adoption of Microsoft 365 Copilot by implementing a strategic communication plan. This plan will focus on promoting awareness, facilitating user education, and encouraging active participation across the organization to maximize the benefits of Microsoft 365 Copilot . We make communication a key part of our approach. The communication plan's purpose is to share and involve end-users in the new digital workplace. We want to communicate in a way that is relevant and specific to each end-user and address their possible concerns or questions.We base the communication plan on the Prosci ADKAR model, which looks at the individual information needs of the end-user. ADKAR identifies certain key moments that an end-user may go through during a change. By giving them the right information at the right time, we help the end-user to understand and use the new digital workplace.The ADKAR module will be adjusted to the project's timeline to create a detailed and targeted communication plan. Key Activities: Expected Outcomes: Objective: To provide a broad overview of the latest enhancements in Microsoft 365 Copilot, emphasizing the impact on our daily operations and potential for increased efficiency. Duration: 1 hour Participants : Licensed Microsoft 365 Copilot users Key activities: A reminder for employees to explore Microsoft 365 Copilot prior to the meeting to facilitate a more informed discussion. Objective: To establish a continuous support and engagement program for the Ambassadors of Microsoft 365 Copilot. This initiative aims to maintain high levels of motivation, provide ongoing education, and foster a collaborative community among ambassadors, ensuring the sustained success of the Ambassador Framework. Duration : 1,5 hours Participants : All ambassadors Requirement : Ambassador network already in place. If not, we can define the ambassador framework via standard change. Key Activities: Expected Outcomes: Measurable improvements in Copilot adoption rates, attributed to ambassador activities. Objective: To provide a personalized and confidential environment where employees can deepen their understanding of Copilot, its features, and best practices. Duration: 1 hour per employee Preparation: Session Outline: Post-Session: A follow-up email will be sent to the employee with a summary of the session, answers to the questions discussed, and links to additional resources. Our training programs are tailored to meet the varying levels of expertise and experience of our participants. Whether you are a beginner looking to get started or an advanced user seeking to deepen your knowledge, we have the right training for you. Our learning paths include: training: Copilot for M365 – Foundation Objective : To introduce the participants to the Microsoft 365 Copilot and set the stage for the training journey. Duration : 1,5 hours Key Activities : Copilot in M365 Apps objective : To demonstrate the integration and benefits of Copilot across various Microsoft 365 applications, enhancing user proficiency. Key Activities: Expected Outcomes : training: Copilot for M365 – golden rules of prompting Objective : To equip participants with the skills to craft effective prompts that yield the best results from Copilot. Duration : 1,5 hours Key Activities : training: VIP session Objective : To provide a comprehensive and exclusive overview of Copilot's capabilities and strategic value to the organization's C-level executives. Duration: 1,5 hour Key Activitie s: Expected Outcomes : This session will be designed to resonate with the business acumen of VIPs, ensuring that the conversation is focused on high-level benefits and strategic insights that are most relevant to their roles and responsibilities. Copilot for the knowledge worker (advanced training) Objective: To equip knowledge workers with the skills and knowledge to effectively utilize Copilot across Microsoft Word, Teams, and Outlook to enhance productivity and streamline workflows. Duration: 2 hours Target Audience: Employees who frequently use Microsoft Office Suite in their day-to-day work. Training Outline: Training Materials: Post-Training Support: Copilot in teams Objective: To enable participants to fully utilize Copilot within Microsoft Teams, improving their communication, collaboration, and productivity within the platform. Duration: 45 minutes Training Outline: Materials Provided: Post-Training Support: Maximizing Productivity with Copilot: Word Desktop, Web, and Mobile (advanced training) Objective: To empower participants to use Copilot across all versions of Microsoft Word, enhancing their document creation, editing, and collaboration capabilities on any device. Duration: 1 hour Training Outline: Materials Provided: Post-Training Support: Data Mastery with Copilot: Excel Efficiency Objective: To train participants in the use of Copilot within Microsoft Excel to enhance data analysis, automate tasks, and streamline spreadsheet management. Duration: 45 minutes Training Outline: Materials Provided: Post-Training Support: Presenting with Precision: Copilot in PowerPoint Objective: To enable participants to use Copilot within Microsoft PowerPoint to create impactful presentations, automate design tasks, and enhance audience engagement. Duration: 45 minutes Training Outline: Materials Provided: Post-Training Support: Streamlining Your Inbox: Copilot in Outlook Objective: To train participants to utilize Copilot within Microsoft Outlook for efficient email management, calendar optimization, and enhanced communication. Duration: 45 minutes Training Outline: Materials Provided: Post-Training Support: Copilot in loop and whiteboard Objective: To equip participants with the skills to utilize Copilot in Loop and Microsoft Whiteboard for improved collaboration and project management. Duration: 1 hour Training Outline: Materials Provided: Post-Training Support: Copilot in Planner premium Objective: To enable participants to utilize Copilot in Planner Premium for efficient project planning, task management, and goal tracking. Duration: 45 minutes Training Outline: Materials Provided: Post-Training Support: Copilot in Edge – Web version Objective: To familiarize participants with Copilot in Microsoft Edge, enabling them to leverage AI-powered assistance for efficient web browsing, research, and content interaction. Duration: 45 minutes Training Outline: Materials Provided: Post-Training Support: Copilot day is an event designed to create awareness and interest around the use of Copilot. This event is aimed at both licensed and unlicensed employees, with the exact target audience being determined in collaboration with the customer. Location: Preferably on-site, but a hybrid setup is also possible to reach as many employees as possible. Objective: The main goal of Copilot Day is to inspire and inform employees about the possibilities and benefits of Copilot. We want to provide them with the knowledge and tools needed to use Copilot effectively in their daily work. Program: Through these interactive and informative sessions, we aim to create an environment where employees feel comfortable asking questions, exploring new ideas, and discovering the possibilities of Copilot. This event will not only increase their knowledge but also their enthusiasm and willingness to embrace and integrate Copilot into their work processes. Objective: To provide in-depth training on specific Microsoft 365 Copilot topics and help participants master their skills through hands-on exercises during interactive lab sessions. This initiative aims to enhance participants' understanding and proficiency in using Copilot. Target Audience: Employees with a license (to be determined together with the customer). Max 20 people per lab Location: Preferably on-site (hybrid is also an option) Key Activities: Hands-On Exercises: Expected Outcomes:

Section.name: Non-standard changes SKUs
Section.Content: Non-standard changes: NON-Standard Change Category Identify impactful use cases for Microsoft 365 copilot M365 Copilot Analyze impactful use case M365 Copilot identify and articulate the most impactful use cases for Microsoft 365 Copilot Objective: To assist the customer in identifying a use case for Microsoft 365 Copilot that can be realized with standard functionalities, without the need for Copilot Studio integrations. Duration : 1 workshop of 2 hours Participants : Business key users and decision maker (max 6 people per meeting) Key Activities: Expected Outcome: Analyze impactful use case Objective: To define the specific tasks associated with the selected use case and identify the pain points that Microsoft 365 Copilot can alleviate. Duration : 2 workshops of 2 hours Participants : Business key users and decision maker (max 6 people per meeting) Key Activities: Expected Outcome: ACTIVITIES & DELIVERABLES customer CEGEKA IDENTIFY AND ARTICULATE THE MOST IMPACTFUL USE CASES FOR MICROSOFT 365 COPILOT ANALYZE IMPACTFUL USE CASE Responsible: The person/organization that carries out the task. He or she is accountable to the person ultimately responsible (Accountable); Accountable: This person/organization is ultimately responsible for completing one or more project tasks. Therefore, accountability is given to the person ultimately responsible, and he or she approves or disapproves a task; Consulted: This person/organization is asked for advice in advance. He or she must provide approval or input for a certain task in the project; Informed: This person/organization is informed about the decisions in the progress of the process or project. Of course, this person cannot influence the result of the task.

Section.name: Service Window
Section.Content: Table below gives an overview of the applicable Service Windows for each Standard & Optional service Service windows description SERVICE CEGEKA Office hours 8x5: 9AM – 5PM, Monday up to and including Friday All standard & Optional services CEGEKA extended office hours 12x5: 7AM – 7PM, Monday up to and including Friday N/A cegeka 24x7 24x7 N/A

Section.name: Out of scope
Section.Content: Everything that is not included in this Service is by default out of scope.

Section.name: Cross-functional services
Section.Content: In order to guarantee the Service quality, Cegeka refers to the cross-functional Services from the contract document set and their corresponding standard KPI's.
